plugin.name: wayfire-slide-peek
plugin._long: Slide the foreground (windows and panel) off one screen edge while the lumen-desktop grid slides in from the opposite edge, over the stationary wallpaper.

option.name: dismiss
option._long: Optional secondary binding that only closes the slide. Unset by default so it does not conflict with other plugins that consume Escape.

option.name: direction
option._long: Which edge the desktop grid enters from. "top" slides the grid down from the top while the foreground exits off the bottom; "bottom" slides it up from the bottom while the foreground exits off the top.

option.name: desktop_app_id
option._long: App-id (layer-shell namespace) of the desktop grid surface. It is kept hidden while the slide is closed and revealed only while it is open.
